Trigger.name: Dice rolls
Trigger.script:
local d1 = tonumber(matches[2]) local d2 = tonumber(matches[3]) local name = matches[4]
dice_rolls:add(name, d1 + d2)

regexCodeList.string: A bartender rolls a (\d+) and a (\d+) for (.+)!$

Alias.name: Dice add
Alias.script:
--syntax: dice add name number
local name = matches[2] local value = tonumber(matches[3])
dice_rolls:add(name, value)

Script.name: Dice rolls
Script.script:
dice_rolls = dice_rolls or {data={}} dice_rolls.version = "1.0"
dice_rolls.help = [[Dice roll tracker
dice help -- display this help message dice version -- display version number dice clear -- clear out ALL dice rolls dice show -- display dice rolls dice add xxx yyy -- add a name and number dice remove xxx -- remove all rolls for a name (case sensitive) dice pop xxx -- remove the most recent roll for a name (case sensitive) ]]
function dice_rolls:echo(what, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "(dice_rolls): " local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: Dice add
Script.script: function dice_rolls:add(name, value) if table.contains(self.data, name) then table.insert(self.data[name], value) else self.data[name] = {value} end self:echo(f'Added roll of {value} for {name}\n') end

Script.name: Dice remove
Script.script:
function dice_rolls:remove(name) if table.contains(self.data, name) then self.data[name] = nil self:echo(f'All data for {name} removed
') else self:echo(f'{name} not found in dice roll data!
', true) end end
function dice_rolls:pop(name) if table.contains(self.data, name) then local size = table.size(self.data[name]) self.data[name][size] = nil self:echo(f'Most recent dice roll for {name} removed
') else self:echo(f'{name} not found in dice roll data!
', true) end end

Script.name: Dice clear
Dice sort
Script.script:
function dice_rolls.sort(t, a, b) --the two values in the table for the given keys (names) --each of these are themselves tables of the dice rolls local t1 = t[a] local t2 = t[b]
for i=1, table.size(t1), 1 do --if second player doesn't have a roll this round, --we are beating them by default if t2[i] == nil then return true end --if second player has a worse roll, we beat them if t1[i] > t2[i] then return true --otherwise they beat us elseif t1[i] < t2[i] then return false end end --catch all when two people are exactly equal --neither is better than the other return false end

Script.name: Dice winners
Dice show
Script.script:
function dice_rolls:show() if table.is_empty(self.data) then self:echo("No dice data stored!
") return end
local result = "" for name, _ in spairs(self.data, self.sort) do result = f'{result}{name}, ' end self:echo(f'win order = {dice_rolls:winners()}
')
for name, rolls in spairs(self.data, self.sort) do cecho(string.format("%-20s|", name)) for _, value in ipairs(rolls) do cecho(string.format("%3s|", value)) end cecho("
") end end
